nuggets.text: Lumen5's features page positions the product around turning blog posts, PDFs, URLs, pasted text, and outlines into branded videos with an article-to-video workflow.
The features page says AI Script Composer analyzes the source text, surfaces key messages, and generates multiple script variations that can be adjusted for tone, pacing, and length.
Lumen5's product page highlights brand customization controls such as custom colors, custom fonts, watermarks, graphics, layouts, and multiple aspect ratios for reformatting videos.
The features page also advertises AI Voiceover with more than 40 voices and multilingual options, plus a Talking Head feature for presenter clips and overlays inside Lumen5 videos.
Lumen5's Free plan is positioned as a forever-free entry point with 5 videos per month, 2-minute video duration, and a branded outro.
Basic is priced at $19 per month billed yearly and adds 3,500 AI media credits, no Lumen5 branding, and longer AI voiceover support.
Starter is priced at $59 per month billed yearly and upgrades output to 1080p, adds 12,000 AI media credits, access to 50M plus stock assets, and custom fonts plus colors.
Pro is priced at $149 per month billed yearly and adds 36,000 AI media credits, 500M stock assets, custom watermarks, uploaded fonts, multiple blueprints, and multiple brand kits.
Across the comparison table, self-serve plans stay single-user, maximum video duration remains 10 minutes, and AI voiceover minutes step up from 240 to 720 to 2160 minutes per year.

Team is a custom enterprise tier that adds multiple users, custom workspaces, unlimited translations, SSO, approval workflow, DAM integration, enterprise security, invoiced billing, and a dedicated customer success manager.

topUpClaims.note: Official billing docs say subscriptions can be canceled at any time, cancellations take effect at the end of the current billing cycle, and accounts can be paused for up to 3 months. The same billing guidance also references a 7-day money-back test window on upgrades.
Official help says Lumen5 videos are limited to 10 minutes regardless of subscription level.
Official help says published videos can be set to public, anyone-with-a-link, or private. Private videos are only accessible to the owner or team members sharing the workspace on Enterprise.

Official licensing guidance says users have full commercial rights to the videos they create with Lumen5 and can create client work, while commercial use still depends on using editorial-only media correctly.

Official billing guidance says the free Community plan keeps the branded outro and that paid upgrades remove Lumen5 branding. Higher-tier custom watermark controls are documented separately, so this is a bounded branding note rather than a full watermark policy matrix.
